positive: Highly detailed, symmetrical composition of ethereal bioluminescent flora and celestial elements, featuring glowing cosmic vines, stylized moon phases, and intricate glowing mandalas of leaves. The style is modern mystical geometric illustration mixed with clean vector art aesthetics. Strong, visible outlines, flat color blocking, and central placement, ensuring high visual impact on fabric. Strong contrast between a deep midnight indigo/black background and neon teal, magenta, and electric blue glowing foreground elements. Studio quality, suitable for apparel print.
negative: blur, text, watermark, low resolution, artifacts, bad anatomy, distorted, extra limbs, noise, poorly drawn, signature
